case_title: LAW OFFICES OF DANIEL RAY BACON et al VS GLOBAL FIRE AND SAFETY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,062.32 FILED BY LAW OFFICES OF DANIEL RAY BACON BACON, DANIEL RAY ESQ. (103866) AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL FIRE AND SAFETY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,143.58 AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL FIRE AND SAFETY, INC.
